languages.original_text: "I have encountered inconsistencies in my research. Ghost colonies with fresh tracks that match the descriptions of these xenos from various sources. Adeptus Mechanicus expeditions that plunged into obsidian ruins, never to return. Gaps in the knowledge repositories of individual worlds, as if someone had been trying to hide information. In isolation, all these are unexplained coincidences, but if I analyse the cumulative frequency of the events and the systems in which they occurred, and compare them to the few things I do know, I can detect certain patterns. The ancient xenos are exhibiting activity."

languages.text: "Есть неконсистентности, которые я обнаружил в своих поисках. Колонии-призраки со свежими следами, подходящими под описания этих ксеносов из различных источников. Экспедии Адептус Механикус, что ныряли в обсидиановые руины и не возвращались. Пробелы в репозиториях знаний отдельных миров, словно кто-то пытался утаить информацию. Все это — необъяснимые случайности по отдельности, но если проанализировать совокупную частоту событий, системы, где они происходили, и сопоставить с тем немногим, что мне известно, то можно найти определенные паттерны. Древние ксеносы проявляют активность".

In isolation, all these are unexplained coincidences, but if I analyse the cumulative frequency of the events and the systems in which they occurred, and compare them to the few things I do know, I can detect certain patterns. The ancient xenos are exhibiting activity."

languages.text: «He encontrado inconsistencias en mi investigación. Colonias fantasma con huellas recientes que coinciden con las descripciones de estos xenos según diversas fuentes. Expediciones del Adeptus Mechanicus que se adentraron en ruinas de obsidiana y jamás regresaron. Lagunas en los repositorios de conocimiento de mundos específicos, como si alguien hubiera intentado ocultar información. Por separado, todos estos sucesos son coincidencias sin mayor explicación, pero al analizar la frecuencia acumulativa de estos eventos y los sistemas en los que se produjeron y compararlos con lo poco que sé con seguridad, puedo detectar ciertos patrones. Los xenos ancestrales están activos».
languages.original_text: "I have encountered inconsistencies in my research. Ghost colonies with fresh tracks that match the descriptions of these xenos from various sources. Adeptus Mechanicus expeditions that plunged into obsidian ruins, never to return. Gaps in the knowledge repositories of individual worlds, as if someone had been trying to hide information. In isolation, all these are unexplained coincidences, but if I analyse the cumulative frequency of the events and the systems in which they occurred, and compare them to the few things I do know, I can detect certain patterns. The ancient xenos are exhibiting activity."

traits.locale_text: «He encontrado inconsistencias en mi investigación. Colonias fantasma con huellas recientes que coinciden con las descripciones de estos xenos según diversas fuentes. Expediciones del Adeptus Mechanicus que se adentraron en ruinas de obsidiana y jamás regresaron. Lagunas en los repositorios de conocimiento de mundos específicos, como si alguien hubiera intentado ocultar información. Por separado, todos estos sucesos son coincidencias sin mayor explicación, pero al analizar la frecuencia acumulativa de estos eventos y los sistemas en los que se produjeron y compararlos con lo poco que sé con seguridad, puedo detectar ciertos patrones. Los xenos ancestrales están activos».

languages.text: “我的研究中出现了一些自相矛盾的地方。无人居住却留下新鲜痕迹的幽灵殖民地，这些痕迹与各类资料对这些异形的描述相吻合。机械修会的远征队深入黑曜废墟，再也没有回来。某些世界的知识库中存在空白，就像有人刻意抹去了信息。如果孤立地看，这些都是无法解释的巧合。但如果将这些事件的累积发生频率和所在星系进行综合分析，再和我掌握的少量信息对比，就能看出某种规律。那些古老的异形正在活动。”
languages.original_text: "I have encountered inconsistencies in my research. Ghost colonies with fresh tracks that match the descriptions of these xenos from various sources. Adeptus Mechanicus expeditions that plunged into obsidian ruins, never to return. Gaps in the knowledge repositories of individual worlds, as if someone had been trying to hide information. In isolation, all these are unexplained coincidences, but if I analyse the cumulative frequency of the events and the systems in which they occurred, and compare them to the few things I do know, I can detect certain patterns. The ancient xenos are exhibiting activity."

traits.locale_text: “我的研究中出现了一些自相矛盾的地方。无人居住却留下新鲜痕迹的幽灵殖民地，这些痕迹与各类资料对这些异形的描述相吻合。机械修会的远征队深入黑曜废墟，再也没有回来。某些世界的知识库中存在空白，就像有人刻意抹去了信息。如果孤立地看，这些都是无法解释的巧合。但如果将这些事件的累积发生频率和所在星系进行综合分析，再和我掌握的少量信息对比，就能看出某种规律。那些古老的异形正在活动。”

languages.text: « Mes recherches m'ont permis de découvrir un certain nombre d'incohérences : des colonies fantômes où l'on trouve des traces récentes correspondant à différentes descriptions de ces xénos ; des expéditions de l'Adeptus Mechanicus s'étant aventurées au cœur de ruines d'obsidienne sans jamais revenir ; des trous dans les reliquaires de savoir de certains mondes, comme si quelqu'un avait cherché à masquer des informations. Pris séparément, ces faits ne sont que de simples coïncidences inexpliquées, mais en analysant leur fréquence cumulative et leurs systèmes d'origine, et en les comparant au peu de choses que je sais, j'ai pu détecter certains traits distinctifs. Ces anciens xénos montrent des signes d'activité. »
languages.original_text: "I have encountered inconsistencies in my research. Ghost colonies with fresh tracks that match the descriptions of these xenos from various sources. Adeptus Mechanicus expeditions that plunged into obsidian ruins, never to return. Gaps in the knowledge repositories of individual worlds, as if someone had been trying to hide information. In isolation, all these are unexplained coincidences, but if I analyse the cumulative frequency of the events and the systems in which they occurred, and compare them to the few things I do know, I can detect certain patterns. The ancient xenos are exhibiting activity."

traits.locale_text: « Mes recherches m'ont permis de découvrir un certain nombre d'incohérences : des colonies fantômes où l'on trouve des traces récentes correspondant à différentes descriptions de ces xénos ; des expéditions de l'Adeptus Mechanicus s'étant aventurées au cœur de ruines d'obsidienne sans jamais revenir ; des trous dans les reliquaires de savoir de certains mondes, comme si quelqu'un avait cherché à masquer des informations. Pris séparément, ces faits ne sont que de simples coïncidences inexpliquées, mais en analysant leur fréquence cumulative et leurs systèmes d'origine, et en les comparant au peu de choses que je sais, j'ai pu détecter certains traits distinctifs. Ces anciens xénos montrent des signes d'activité. »

languages.text: "Ich bin bei meinen Forschungen auf Inkonsistenzen gestoßen. Geisterkolonien mit frischen Spuren, die den Beschreibungen dieser Xenos aus verschiedenen Quellen entsprechen. Expeditionen des Adeptus Mechanicus, die sich in Ruinen aus Obsidian wagten und nie zurückkehrten. Lücken in den Wissensrepositorien einzelner Welten, als hätte jemand versucht, Informationen zu verbergen. Einzeln betrachtet sind das unerklärliche Zufälle, aber wenn ich die kumulative Häufigkeit der Ereignisse und die betroffenen Systeme analysiere und sie mit den wenigen Dingen vergleiche, die ich weiß, erkenne ich gewisse Muster. Die alten Xenos sind ausgesprochen aktiv."
languages.original_text: "I have encountered inconsistencies in my research. Ghost colonies with fresh tracks that match the descriptions of these xenos from various sources. Adeptus Mechanicus expeditions that plunged into obsidian ruins, never to return. Gaps in the knowledge repositories of individual worlds, as if someone had been trying to hide information. In isolation, all these are unexplained coincidences, but if I analyse the cumulative frequency of the events and the systems in which they occurred, and compare them to the few things I do know, I can detect certain patterns. The ancient xenos are exhibiting activity."

Die alten Xenos sind ausgesprochen aktiv."

languages.text: "私の調査には矛盾がある。様々な情報源から得た異星人の記述と一致する、新しい足跡を持つゴーストコロニー。アデプタス・メカニクスの探検隊は黒曜石の廃墟に突入し、二度と戻ってこなかった。まるで誰かが情報を隠そうとしていたかのような、各世界の知識蓄積のギャップ。単独で見れば、これらはすべて説明のつかない偶然の一致である。しかし、これらの出来事の累積頻度や発生した星系を分析し、私が知っているいくつかの事柄と照らし合わせると、あるパターンを見出すことができる。古代の異星人が活動を示している」。
languages.original_text: "I have encountered inconsistencies in my research. Ghost colonies with fresh tracks that match the descriptions of these xenos from various sources. Adeptus Mechanicus expeditions that plunged into obsidian ruins, never to return. Gaps in the knowledge repositories of individual worlds, as if someone had been trying to hide information. In isolation, all these are unexplained coincidences, but if I analyse the cumulative frequency of the events and the systems in which they occurred, and compare them to the few things I do know, I can detect certain patterns. The ancient xenos are exhibiting activity."

languages.text: "Araştırmalarımda tutarsızlıklarla karşılaştım. Çeşitli kaynaklardan gelen bu zenoların tasvirleriyle eşleşen yeni izlere sahip hayalet koloniler. Obsidiyen harabelere dalıp bir daha geri dönmeyen Adeptus Mechanicus keşif seferleri. Sanki birileri bilgiyi saklamaya çalışıyormuş gibi münferit dünyaların bilgi bankalarındaki boşluklar. Tek başlarına ele alındığında tüm bunlar açıklanamayan tesadüfler olsa da olayların kümülatif sıklığını ve meydana geldikleri sistemleri analiz edersem ve bunları bildiğim birkaç şeyle karşılaştırırsam belirli kalıpları tespit edebilirim. Kadim zenolar faaliyet gösteriyor."
